001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.StateEnum.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.lang.reflect.*;
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
036
037/**
038 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link YamlParser}.
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
041 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
042 * </ul>
043 */
044@SuppressWarnings({
045   "java:S125",  // State-machine and parse-path comments are documentation, not commented-out code
046   "java:S135",  // Multiple break/continue acceptable for YAML parsing state machines
047   "java:S2589", // State checks in error path - analyzer FP on state machine flow
048   "java:S2677", // r.read() return value intentionally ignored when consuming/skipping chars
049   "java:S3626", // Redundant jump acceptable for state machine clarity
050   "unchecked",
051   "rawtypes",
052   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
053})
054public class YamlParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
055
056   /**
057    * Builder class.
058    */
059   public static class Builder extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
060
061      private YamlParser ctx;
062
063      /**
064       * Constructor
065       *
066       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
067       */
068      protected Builder(YamlParser ctx) {
069         super(ctx);
070         this.ctx = ctx;
071      }
072
073      @Override
074      public YamlParserSession build() {
075         return new YamlParserSession(this);
076      }
077
078   }
079
080   /**
081    * Creates a new builder for this object.
082    *
083    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
084    * @return A new builder.
085    */
086   public static Builder create(YamlParser ctx) {
087      return new Builder(ctx);
088   }
089
090   @SuppressWarnings({
091      "unused" // Stored for API consistency with Builder.create(YamlParser)
092   })
093   private final YamlParser ctx;
094
095   /**
096    * Constructor.
097    *
098    * @param builder The builder for this object.
099    */
100   protected YamlParserSession(Builder builder) {
101      super(builder);
102      ctx = builder.ctx;
103   }
104
105   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
106   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
107      try (var r = pipe.getParserReader()) {
108         if (r == null)
109            return null;
110         return parseAnything(type, r, getOuter(), null);
111      }
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over a YAML document, bound to this live session.
116    * {@link RecordReader#read(Class) read(...)} delegates to the polymorphic
117    * {@link ParserSession#parse(Object, Class)} entry point.
118    *
119    * @param input The input.
120    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
121    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
122    */
123   @Override /* RecordReadable */
124   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
125      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
126   }
127
128   /**
129    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} for YAML, bound to this live session.  Calls
130    * {@code parse(input, List.class, Object.class)} once and iterates the result.
131    *
132    * <h5 class='section'>Streaming status:</h5>
133    * <p>
134    * A top-level YAML block sequence ({@code - elem} per line) <i>is</i> forward-readable in
135    * principle, so true element-at-a-time streaming is <b>feasible</b> here (unlike Parquet/BSON).
136    * It is left buffered for now: Juneau's YAML reader is a single hand-written indentation state
137    * machine ({@code parseBlockSequence}/{@code parseFlowSequence}) whose per-element advance and
138    * dedent bookkeeping are not currently exposed as a pull cursor, and extracting that safely is a
139    * non-trivial parser refactor with real regression surface.  This
140    * is demand-driven &mdash; convert when a large-YAML-array use case justifies the refactor.
141    *
142    * @param input The input.
143    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
144    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
145    */
146   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
147   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
148      return RecordAdapter.arrayReader(this, input);
149   }
150
151   /**
152    * The YAML record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
153    *
154    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
155    */
156   @Override /* RecordReadable */
157   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
158
159   /**
160    * The YAML array-record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
161    *
162    * <p>
163    * Genuine streaming is feasible for YAML block sequences but deferred (demand-driven) pending a
164    * pull-cursor refactor of the indentation state machine; see {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
165    *
166    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
167    */
168   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
169   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
170
171   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
172   protected <E> Collection<E> doParseIntoCollection(ParserPipe pipe, Collection<E> c, Type elementType) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
173      try (var r = pipe.getParserReader()) {
174         skipWhitespaceAndComments(r);
175         int ch = r.peek();
176         if (ch == '[') {
177            parseFlowSequence(r, c, getClassMeta(elementType), null);
178         } else {
179            parseBlockSequence(r, c, getClassMeta(elementType), null, 0);
180         }
181         return c;
182      }
183   }
184
185   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
186   protected <K,V> Map<K,V> doParseIntoMap(ParserPipe pipe, Map<K,V> m, Type keyType, Type valueType) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
187      try (var r = pipe.getParserReader()) {
188         skipWhitespaceAndComments(r);
189         int ch = r.peek();
190         if (ch == '{') {
191            parseFlowMapping(r, m, (ClassMeta<K>)getClassMeta(keyType), (ClassMeta<V>)getClassMeta(valueType), null);
192         } else {
193            parseBlockMapping(r, m, (ClassMeta<K>)getClassMeta(keyType), (ClassMeta<V>)getClassMeta(valueType), null, 0);
194         }
195         return m;
196      }
197   }
198
199   @SuppressWarnings({
200      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser dispatch
201      "java:S6541" // Brain method acceptable for parser dispatch
202   })
203   private <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<?> eType, ParserReader r, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
204
205      if (eType == null)
206         eType = object();
207      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
208      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
209      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
210      if (nn(builder))
211         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
212      else if (nn(swap))
213         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
214      else
215         sType = eType;
216
217      if (sType.isOptional())
218         return (T)o(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), r, outer, pMeta));
219
220      setCurrentClass(sType);
221
222      Object o = null;
223
224      skipWhitespaceAndComments(r);
225      skipDocumentMarker(r);
226      skipWhitespaceAndComments(r);
227
228      int contentColumn = r.getPosition().getColumn();
229      int c = r.peek();
230      if (c == -1) {
231         // Let o be null.
232      } else if (c == '{') {
233         if (sType.isObject()) {
234            var m2 = newGenericMap();
235            parseFlowMapping(r, m2, string(), object(), pMeta);
236            o = cast(m2, pMeta, eType);
237         } else if (nn(builder)) {
238            var m = toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
239            o = builder.build(this, parseIntoBeanMap(r, m).getBean(), eType);
240         } else if (sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
241            var m = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
242            o = parseIntoBeanMap(r, m).getBean();
243         } else if (sType.isMap()) {
244            Map m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
245            o = parseFlowMapping(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
246         } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
247            var m = newGenericMap();
248            parseFlowMapping(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
249            o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
250         } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
251            var m = newGenericMap();
252            parseFlowMapping(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
253            o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
254         } else {
255            Map m = newGenericMap();
256            parseFlowMapping(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
257            if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
258               o = cast((MarshalledMap)m, pMeta, eType);
259            else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
260               o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
261            else
262               throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
263         }
264      } else if (c == '[') {
265         if (sType.isObject()) {
266            o = parseFlowSequence(r, newGenericList(), object(), pMeta);
267         } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
268            Collection l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance() : newGenericList());
269            o = parseFlowSequence(r, l, sType, pMeta);
270         } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
271            var l = (ArrayList)parseFlowSequence(r, list(), sType, pMeta);
272            o = toArray(sType, l);
273         } else {
274            throw new ParseException(this, "Unrecognized syntax for class type ''{0}'', starting character ''{1}''", sType, (char)c);
275         }
276      } else if (c == '\'') {
277         String s = parseSingleQuotedString(r);
278         o = handleQuotedScalar(s, r, sType, eType, builder, outer, pMeta, contentColumn > 0 ? contentColumn - 1 : 0);
279      } else if (c == '"') {
280         String s = parseDoubleQuotedString(r);
281         o = handleQuotedScalar(s, r, sType, eType, builder, outer, pMeta, contentColumn > 0 ? contentColumn - 1 : 0);
282      } else if (c == '-') {
283         int c2 = peekSecondChar(r);
284         if (c2 == ' ' || c2 == '\n' || c2 == '\r') {
285            if (sType.isObject()) {
286               o = parseBlockSequence(r, newGenericList(), object(), pMeta, 0);
287            } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
288               Collection l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance() : newGenericList());
289               o = parseBlockSequence(r, l, sType, pMeta, 0);
290            } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
291               var l = (ArrayList)parseBlockSequence(r, list(), sType, pMeta, 0);
292               o = toArray(sType, l);
293            } else {
294               throw new ParseException(this, "Unrecognized syntax for class type ''{0}'', starting character ''{1}''", sType, (char)c);
295            }
296         } else {
297            String s = parsePlainScalar(r, 0);
298            o = convertToType(s, sType, eType, outer, pMeta);
299         }
300      } else if (c == '|' || c == '>') {
301         String s = parseBlockScalar(r, (char)c);
302         o = convertToType(s, sType, eType, outer, pMeta);
303      } else if (c == '~') {
304         r.read(); // consume '~'
305         // o remains null (initialized at line 255)
306      } else {
307         String s = parsePlainScalar(r, 0);
308         o = handlePlainScalar(s, r, sType, eType, builder, outer, pMeta, contentColumn > 0 ? contentColumn - 1 : 0);
309      }
310
311      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
312         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
313
314      if (nn(outer))
315         setParent(eType, o, outer);
316
317      return (T)o;
318   }
319
320   @SuppressWarnings({
321      "java:S107", // 8 parameters required for YAML scalar handling dispatch
322      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for scalar type dispatch
323      "java:S6541" // Brain method acceptable for scalar handling
324   })
325   private <T> Object handleQuotedScalar(String s, ParserReader r, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eType, BuilderSwap<T,Object> builder, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, int keyIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
326      if (looksLikeMappingKey(r)) {
327         r.read(); // consume ':'
328         int cp = r.peek();
329         if (cp == ' ')
330            r.read();
331
332         if (sType.isObject()) {
333            var m2 = newGenericMap();
334            Object value = parseAnything(object(), r, m2, pMeta);
335            String ts = trim(s);
336            setName(object(), value, ts);
337            m2.put(ts, value);
338            parseBlockMappingRemainder(r, m2, string(), object(), pMeta, keyIndent);
339            return cast(m2, pMeta, eType);
340         } else if (nn(builder)) {
341            var m = toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
342            parseBeanProperty(r, m, s);
343            parseIntoBeanMapBlockRemainder(r, m, keyIndent);
344            return builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType);
345         } else if (sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
346            var m = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
347            parseBeanProperty(r, m, s);
348            parseIntoBeanMapBlockRemainder(r, m, keyIndent);
349            return m.getBean();
350         } else if (sType.isMap()) {
351            Map m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
352            Object value = parseAnything(sType.getValueType(), r, m, pMeta);
353            Object key = convertAttrToType(m, trim(s), sType.getKeyType());
354            setName(sType.getValueType(), value, key);
355            m.put(key, value);
356            parseBlockMappingRemainder(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta, keyIndent);
357            return m;
358         } else {
359            var m2 = newGenericMap();
360            Object value = parseAnything(object(), r, m2, pMeta);
361            m2.put(s, value);
362            parseBlockMappingRemainder(r, m2, string(), object(), pMeta, keyIndent);
363            if (m2.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
364               return cast(m2, pMeta, eType);
365            if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
366               return newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m2).getBean();
367            throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
368         }
369      }
370      if (sType.isObject())
371         return trim(s);
372      return convertToType(s, sType, eType, outer, pMeta);
373   }
374
375   @SuppressWarnings({
376      "java:S107", // 8 parameters required for YAML scalar handling dispatch
377      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for scalar type dispatch
378      "java:S6541" // Brain method acceptable for scalar handling
379   })
380   private <T> Object handlePlainScalar(String s, ParserReader r, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eType, BuilderSwap<T,Object> builder, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, int keyIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
381      if (s.isEmpty())
382         return null;
383
384      if (looksLikeMappingKey(r)) {
385         r.read(); // consume ':'
386         int cp = r.peek();
387         if (cp == ' ')
388            r.read(); // consume space after ':'
389
390         String keyStr = isYamlNull(s) ? null : trim(s);
391         if (sType.isObject()) {
392            var m2 = newGenericMap();
393            Object value = parseAnything(object(), r, m2, pMeta);
394            setName(object(), value, keyStr);
395            m2.put(keyStr, value);
396            parseBlockMappingRemainder(r, m2, string(), object(), pMeta, keyIndent);
397            return cast(m2, pMeta, eType);
398         } else if (nn(builder)) {
399            var m = toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
400            parseBeanProperty(r, m, s);
401            parseIntoBeanMapBlockRemainder(r, m, keyIndent);
402            return builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType);
403         } else if (sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
404            var m = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
405            parseBeanProperty(r, m, s);
406            parseIntoBeanMapBlockRemainder(r, m, keyIndent);
407            return m.getBean();
408         } else if (sType.isMap()) {
409            Map m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
410            Object value = parseAnything(sType.getValueType(), r, m, pMeta);
411            Object key = convertAttrToType(m, keyStr, sType.getKeyType());
412            setName(sType.getValueType(), value, key);
413            m.put(key, value);
414            parseBlockMappingRemainder(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta, keyIndent);
415            return m;
416         } else {
417            var m2 = newGenericMap();
418            Object value = parseAnything(object(), r, m2, pMeta);
419            m2.put(s, value);
420            parseBlockMappingRemainder(r, m2, string(), object(), pMeta, keyIndent);
421            if (m2.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
422               return cast(m2, pMeta, eType);
423            if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
424               return newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m2).getBean();
425            throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
426         }
427      }
428
429      if (isYamlNull(s))
430         return null;
431
432      if ("true".equals(s) || "false".equals(s)) {
433         if (sType.isObject() || sType.isBoolean())
434            return Boolean.valueOf(s);
435         return convertToType(s, sType, eType, outer, pMeta);
436      }
437
438      return convertToType(s, sType, eType, outer, pMeta);
439   }
440
441   @SuppressWarnings({
442      "unused",    // eType, pMeta kept for API consistency with callers
443      "java:S1172" // Same as above
444   })
445   private Object convertToType(String s, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws ParseException {
446      if (sType.isObject()) {
447         return resolveScalarType(trim(s));
448      } else if (sType.isCharSequence()) {
449         return trim(s);
450      } else if (sType.isChar()) {
451         return parseCharacter(s);
452      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
453         return StringUtils.parseNumber(s, (Class<? extends Number>)sType.inner());
454      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
455         return b(s);
456      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
457         return parseDate(s, sType);
458      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
459         return parseCalendar(s, sType);
460      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
461         return parseTemporal(s, sType);
462      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
463         return parseDuration(s);
464      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
465         return parsePeriod(s);
466      } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer)) {
467         return sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, s);
468      } else {
469         throw new ParseException(this, "Unrecognized syntax for class type ''{0}'', value ''{1}''", sType, s);
470      }
471   }
472
473   private static boolean looksLikeMappingKey(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
474      return r.peek() == ':';
475   }
476
477   private static boolean isYamlNull(String s) {
478      return "null".equals(s) || "Null".equals(s) || "NULL".equals(s) || "~".equals(s);
479   }
480
481   private <K,V> void parseBlockMappingRemainder(ParserReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, int parentIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
482      parseBlockMapping(r, m, keyType, valueType, pMeta, parentIndent);
483   }
484
485   private <T> void parseIntoBeanMapBlockRemainder(ParserReader r, BeanMap<T> m, int parentIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
486      parseIntoBeanMapBlock(r, m, parentIndent);
487   }
488
489   private <T> void parseBeanProperty(ParserReader r, BeanMap<T> m, String currAttr) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
490      var pm = m.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
491      setCurrentProperty(pm);
492      if (pm == null) {
493         onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, parseAnything(object(), r, m.getBean(false), null));
494      } else {
495         var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pm.getBeanInfo();
496         Object value = parseAnything(cm, r, m.getBean(false), pm);
497         setName(cm, value, currAttr);
498         try {
499            pm.set(m, currAttr, value);
500         } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
501            onBeanSetterException(pm, e);
502            throw e;
503         }
504      }
505      setCurrentProperty(null);
506   }
507
508   private static boolean isNullBlockValue(ParserReader r, int blockIndent) throws IOException {
509      int c = r.peek();
510      if (c == -1)
511         return true;
512      if (c != '\n' && c != '\r')
513         return false;
514      int charsRead = 0;
515      while (true) {
516         c = r.read();
517         if (c == -1) {
518            for (int j = 0; j < charsRead; j++) r.unread();
519            return true;
520         }
521         charsRead++;
522         if (c != '\n' && c != '\r' && c != ' ' && c != '\t')
523            break;
524      }
525      int nextColumn = r.getPosition().getColumn() - 1;
526      for (int j = 0; j < charsRead; j++) r.unread();
527      return nextColumn <= blockIndent;
528   }
529
530   private static int peekSecondChar(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
531      r.read();
532      int c2 = r.peek();
533      r.unread();
534      return c2;
535   }
536
537   // ==========================================
538   // Flow mapping: { key: value, ... }
539   // ==========================================
540   @SuppressWarnings({
541      "java:S1168",
542      "java:S135",
543      "java:S2583",
544      "java:S3776",
545      "java:S6541" // Brain method acceptable for flow mapping state machine
546   })
547   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseFlowMapping(ParserReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
548
549      if (keyType == null)
550         keyType = (ClassMeta<K>)string();
551
552      // S1: Looking for outer {
553      // S2: Looking for key start or }
554      // S3: Found key, looking for :
555      // S4: Found :, looking for value
556      // S5: Looking for , or }
557      // S6: Found , looking for key start
558
559      var state = S1;
560      String currKey = null;
561      int c = 0;
562      while (c != -1) {
563         c = r.read();
564         if (state == S1) {
565            if (c == '{')
566               state = S2;
567            else if (isWhitespace(c))
568               continue;
569            else
570               break;
571         } else if (state == S2) {
572            if (c == '}') {
573               return m;
574            } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {
575               continue;
576            } else {
577               r.unread();
578               currKey = parseFlowMappingKey(r);
579               state = S3;
580            }
581         } else if (state == S3) {
582            if (c == ':')
583               state = S4;
584            else if (isWhitespace(c))
585               continue;
586         } else if (state == S4) {
587            if (isWhitespace(c))
588               continue;
589            r.unread();
590            K key = convertAttrToType(m, currKey, keyType);
591            V value = parseAnything(valueType, r, m, pMeta);
592            setName(valueType, value, key);
593            m.put(key, value);
594            state = S5;
595         } else if (state == S5) {
596            if (c == ',') {
597               state = S6;
598            } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {
599               continue;
600            } else if (c == '}') {
601               return m;
602            } else {
603               break;
604            }
605         } else if (state == S6) {
606            if (c == '}') {
607               break;
608            } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {
609               continue;
610            } else {
611               r.unread();
612               currKey = parseFlowMappingKey(r);
613               state = S3;
614            }
615         }
616      }
617      if (state == S1)
618         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected '{' at beginning of YAML flow mapping.");
619      if (state == S2)
620         throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find key in YAML flow mapping.");
621      if (state == S3)
622         throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find ':' following key in YAML flow mapping.");
623      if (state == S4)
624         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected value in YAML flow mapping.");
625      if (state == S5)
626         throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find '}' marking end of YAML flow mapping.");
627      if (state == S6)
628         throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected '}' found in YAML flow mapping.");
629
630      return null; // Unreachable.
631   }
632
633   private String parseFlowMappingKey(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
634      int c = r.peek();
635      if (c == '\'' )
636         return parseSingleQuotedString(r);
637      if (c == '"')
638         return parseDoubleQuotedString(r);
639      var key = parsePlainFlowKey(r);
640      if (isYamlNull(key))
641         return null;
642      return key;
643   }
644
645   private static String parsePlainFlowKey(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
646      var sb = new StringBuilder();
647      int c;
648      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
649         if (c == ':' || c == ',' || c == '}' || c == '{' || c == '[' || c == ']') {
650            r.unread();
651            break;
652         }
653         sb.append((char)c);
654      }
655      return sb.toString().trim();
656   }
657
658   // ==========================================
659   // Flow sequence: [ value, ... ]
660   // ==========================================
661   @SuppressWarnings({
662      "java:S1168",
663      "java:S135",
664      "java:S2583",
665      "java:S3776"
666   })
667   private <E> Collection<E> parseFlowSequence(ParserReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
668
669      // S1: Looking for outermost [
670      // S2: Looking for value or ]
671      // S3: Looking for , or ]
672      // S4: Looking for value
673
674      int argIndex = 0;
675
676      var state = S1;
677      int c = 0;
678      while (c != -1) {
679         c = r.read();
680         if (state == S1) {
681            if (c == '[')
682               state = S2;
683            else if (isWhitespace(c))
684               continue;
685            else
686               break;
687         } else if (state == S2) {
688            if (c == ']') {
689               return l;
690            } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {
691               continue;
692            } else if (c != -1) {
693               r.unread();
694               l.add((E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), r, l, pMeta));
695               state = S3;
696            }
697         } else if (state == S3) {
698            if (c == ',') {
699               state = S4;
700            } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {
701               continue;
702            } else if (c == ']') {
703               return l;
704            } else {
705               break;
706            }
707         } else if (state == S4) {
708            if (isWhitespace(c)) {
709               continue;
710            } else if (c == ']') {
711               break;
712            } else if (c != -1) {
713               r.unread();
714               l.add((E)parseAnything(type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType(), r, l, pMeta));
715               state = S3;
716            }
717         }
718      }
719      if (state == S1)
720         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected '[' at beginning of YAML flow sequence.");
721      if (state == S2)
722         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected value or ']' in YAML flow sequence.");
723      if (state == S3)
724         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ',' or ']' in YAML flow sequence.");
725      if (state == S4)
726         throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected trailing comma in YAML flow sequence.");
727
728      return null; // Unreachable.
729   }
730
731   // ==========================================
732   // Block mapping
733   // ==========================================
734   @SuppressWarnings({
735      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for block mapping parsing
736   })
737   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseBlockMapping(ParserReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, int parentIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
738
739      if (keyType == null)
740         keyType = (ClassMeta<K>)string();
741
742      int blockIndent = -1;
743
744      while (true) {
745         int consumed = skipBlanksAndCountIndent(r);
746         int lineIndent = r.getPosition().getColumn();
747         int c = r.peek();
748         if (c == -1)
749            break;
750
751         if (blockIndent == -1) {
752            if (lineIndent <= parentIndent && parentIndent > 0) {
753               unreadSpaces(r, consumed);
754               break;
755            }
756            blockIndent = lineIndent;
757         }
758
759         if (lineIndent < blockIndent) {
760            unreadSpaces(r, consumed);
761            break;
762         }
763
764         c = r.peek();
765         if (c == '#') {
766            skipToEndOfLine(r);
767            continue;
768         }
769
770         String keyStr = trim(parseBlockMappingKey(r));
771
772         c = r.read(); // Should be ':'
773         if (c != ':')
774            throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ':' after key in YAML block mapping, found ''{0}''", (char)c);
775
776         c = r.peek();
777         if (c == ' ')
778            r.read();
779         K key = convertAttrToType(m, keyStr, keyType);
780         V value = (V)parseAnything(valueType, r, m, pMeta);
781         setName(valueType, value, key);
782         m.put(key, value);
783      }
784
785      return m;
786   }
787
788   private static int skipBlanksAndCountIndent(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
789      int indent = 0;
790      int c;
791      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
792         if (c == ' ') {
793            indent++;
794         } else if (c == '\n' || c == '\r') {
795            indent = 0;
796         } else if (c == '\t') {
797            indent++;
798         } else {
799            r.unread();
800            break;
801         }
802      }
803      return indent;
804   }
805
806   private static void unreadSpaces(ParserReader r, int count) throws IOException {
807      for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
808         r.unread();
809   }
810
811   private String parseBlockMappingKey(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
812      int c = r.peek();
813      if (c == '\'')
814         return parseSingleQuotedString(r);
815      if (c == '"')
816         return parseDoubleQuotedString(r);
817      var sb = new StringBuilder();
818      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
819         if (c == ':') {
820            int next = r.peek();
821            if (next == ' ' || next == '\n' || next == '\r' || next == -1) {
822               r.unread();
823               break;
824            }
825            sb.append((char)c);
826         } else if (c == '\n' || c == '\r') {
827            r.unread();
828            break;
829         } else {
830            sb.append((char)c);
831         }
832      }
833      String key = sb.toString().trim();
834      if (isYamlNull(key))
835         return null;
836      return key;
837   }
838
839   // ==========================================
840   // Block mapping for beans
841   // ==========================================
842   @SuppressWarnings({
843      "java:S3776"
844   })
845   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBeanMap(ParserReader r, BeanMap<T> m) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
846      int c = r.peek();
847      if (c == '{') {
848         return parseIntoBeanMapFlow(r, m);
849      }
850      return parseIntoBeanMapBlock(r, m, 0);
851   }
852
853   @SuppressWarnings({
854      "java:S1168",
855      "java:S2583",
856      "java:S3776",
857      "java:S6541" // Brain method acceptable for bean map flow state machine
858   })
859   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBeanMapFlow(ParserReader r, BeanMap<T> m) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
860
861      // S1: Looking for outer {
862      // S2: Looking for attrName start.
863      // S3: Found attrName end, looking for :.
864      // S4: Found :, looking for valStart.
865      // S5: Looking for , or }
866
867      var state = S1;
868      var currAttr = "";
869      int c = 0;
870      mark();
871      try {
872         while (c != -1) {
873            c = r.read();
874            if (state == S1) {
875               if (c == '{')
876                  state = S2;
877               else if (isWhitespace(c))
878                  continue;
879               else
880                  break;
881            } else if (state == S2) {
882               if (c == '}') {
883                  return m;
884               } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {
885                  continue;
886               } else {
887                  r.unread();
888                  mark();
889                  currAttr = parseFlowMappingKey(r);
890                  state = S3;
891               }
892            } else if (state == S3) {
893               if (c == ':')
894                  state = S4;
895               else if (isWhitespace(c))
896                  continue;
897            } else if (state == S4) {
898               if (isWhitespace(c))
899                  continue;
900               if (! currAttr.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName((ClassMeta<?>) m.getBeanInfo()))) {
901                  var pm = m.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
902                  setCurrentProperty(pm);
903                  if (pm == null) {
904                     onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, parseAnything(object(), r.unread(), m.getBean(false), null));
905                     unmark();
906                  } else {
907                     unmark();
908                     var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pm.getBeanInfo();
909                     Object value = parseAnything(cm, r.unread(), m.getBean(false), pm);
910                     setName(cm, value, currAttr);
911                     try {
912                        pm.set(m, currAttr, value);
913                     } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
914                        onBeanSetterException(pm, e);
915                        throw e;
916                     }
917                  }
918                  setCurrentProperty(null);
919               }
920               state = S5;
921            } else if (state == S5) {
922               if (c == ',')
923                  state = S2;
924               else if (isWhitespace(c))
925                  continue;
926               else if (c == '}') {
927                  return m;
928               }
929            }
930         }
931         if (state == S1)
932            throw new ParseException(this, "Expected '{' at beginning of YAML flow mapping.");
933         if (state == S2)
934            throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find attribute name in YAML flow mapping.");
935         if (state == S3)
936            throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find ':' following attribute name in YAML flow mapping.");
937         if (state == S4)
938            throw new ParseException(this, "Expected value in YAML flow mapping.");
939         if (state == S5)
940            throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find '}' marking end of YAML flow mapping.");
941      } finally {
942         unmark();
943      }
944
945      return null; // Unreachable.
946   }
947
948   @SuppressWarnings({
949      "java:S3776"
950   })
951   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBeanMapBlock(ParserReader r, BeanMap<T> m, int parentIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
952
953      int blockIndent = -1;
954
955      mark();
956      try {
957         while (true) {
958            int consumed = skipBlanksAndCountIndent(r);
959            int lineIndent = r.getPosition().getColumn();
960            int c = r.peek();
961            if (c == -1)
962               break;
963
964            if (blockIndent == -1) {
965               if (lineIndent <= parentIndent && parentIndent > 0) {
966                  unreadSpaces(r, consumed);
967                  break;
968               }
969               blockIndent = lineIndent;
970            }
971
972            if (lineIndent < blockIndent) {
973               unreadSpaces(r, consumed);
974               break;
975            }
976
977            c = r.peek();
978            if (c == '#') {
979               skipToEndOfLine(r);
980               continue;
981            }
982
983            String currAttr = trim(parseBlockMappingKey(r));
984
985            c = r.read(); // Should be ':'
986            if (c != ':')
987               throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ':' after attribute name in YAML block mapping, found ''{0}''", (char)c);
988
989            if (! currAttr.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName((ClassMeta<?>) m.getBeanInfo()))) {
990               var pm = m.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
991               setCurrentProperty(pm);
992               if (pm == null) {
993                  c = r.peek();
994                  if (c == ' ')
995                     r.read();
996                  Object v = isNullBlockValue(r, blockIndent) ? null : parseAnything(object(), r, m.getBean(false), null);
997                  onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, v);
998                  unmark();
999               } else {
1000                  unmark();
1001                  var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pm.getBeanInfo();
1002                  c = r.peek();
1003                  if (c == ' ')
1004                     r.read();
1005                  Object value = isNullBlockValue(r, blockIndent) ? null : parseAnything(cm, r, m.getBean(false), pm);
1006                  setName(cm, value, currAttr);
1007                  try {
1008                     pm.set(m, currAttr, value);
1009                  } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
1010                     onBeanSetterException(pm, e);
1011                     throw e;
1012                  }
1013               }
1014               setCurrentProperty(null);
1015            }
1016            mark();
1017         }
1018      } finally {
1019         unmark();
1020      }
1021
1022      return m;
1023   }
1024
1025   // ==========================================
1026   // Block sequence: - value\n- value\n...
1027   // ==========================================
1028   @SuppressWarnings({
1029      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for block sequence parsing
1030   })
1031   private <E> Collection<E> parseBlockSequence(ParserReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, int parentIndent) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
1032
1033      int blockIndent = -1;
1034      int argIndex = 0;
1035
1036      while (true) {
1037         int consumed = skipBlanksAndCountIndent(r);
1038         int lineIndent = r.getPosition().getColumn();
1039         int c = r.peek();
1040         if (c == -1)
1041            break;
1042
1043         if (blockIndent == -1) {
1044            if (lineIndent <= parentIndent && parentIndent > 0) {
1045               unreadSpaces(r, consumed);
1046               break;
1047            }
1048            blockIndent = lineIndent;
1049         }
1050
1051         if (lineIndent < blockIndent) {
1052            unreadSpaces(r, consumed);
1053            break;
1054         }
1055
1056         c = r.peek();
1057         if (c == '#') {
1058            skipToEndOfLine(r);
1059            continue;
1060         }
1061         if (c != '-') {
1062            unreadSpaces(r, lineIndent);
1063            break;
1064         }
1065
1066         r.read(); // consume '-'
1067         c = r.peek();
1068         if (c != ' ' && c != '\n' && c != '\r') {
1069            unreadSpaces(r, lineIndent);
1070            break;
1071         }
1072
1073         if (c == ' ')
1074            r.read(); // consume space after '-'
1075
1076         ClassMeta<?> elementType = type.isArgs() ? type.getArg(argIndex++) : type.getElementType();
1077         l.add((E)parseAnything(elementType, r, l, pMeta));
1078      }
1079
1080      return l;
1081   }
1082
1083   // ==========================================
1084   // Single-quoted string: 'hello ''world'''
1085   // ==========================================
1086   private String parseSingleQuotedString(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
1087      int c = r.read(); // consume opening '
1088      if (c != '\'')
1089         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected single quote to start string.");
1090
1091      var sb = new StringBuilder();
1092      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1093         if (c == '\'') {
1094            int next = r.peek();
1095            if (next == '\'') {
1096               r.read(); // consume escaped '
1097               sb.append('\'');
1098            } else {
1099               return sb.toString();
1100            }
1101         } else {
1102            sb.append((char)c);
1103         }
1104      }
1105      throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find end of single-quoted YAML string.");
1106   }
1107
1108   // ==========================================
1109   // Double-quoted string: "hello \"world\"\n"
1110   // ==========================================
1111   @SuppressWarnings({
1112      "java:S3776"
1113   })
1114   private String parseDoubleQuotedString(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
1115      int c = r.read(); // consume opening "
1116      if (c != '"')
1117         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected double quote to start string.");
1118
1119      var sb = new StringBuilder();
1120      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1121         if (c == '\\') {
1122            c = r.read();
1123            // @formatter:off
1124            switch (c) {
1125               case '\\': sb.append('\\'); break;
1126               case '"': sb.append('"'); break;
1127               case 'n': sb.append('\n'); break;
1128               case 't': sb.append('\t'); break;
1129               case 'r': sb.append('\r'); break;
1130               case '0': sb.append('\0'); break;
1131               case 'a': sb.append('\u0007'); break;
1132               case 'b': sb.append('\b'); break;
1133               case 'f': sb.append('\f'); break;
1134               case 'e': sb.append('\u001b'); break;
1135               case '/': sb.append('/'); break;
1136               case 'x': {
1137                  String hex = r.read(2);
1138                  try {
1139                     sb.append((char)Integer.parseInt(hex, 16));
1140                  } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
1141                     throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid \\x escape sequence in YAML string.");
1142                  }
1143                  break;
1144               }
1145               case 'u': {
1146                  String hex = r.read(4);
1147                  try {
1148                     sb.append((char)Integer.parseInt(hex, 16));
1149                  } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
1150                     throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid \\u escape sequence in YAML string.");
1151                  }
1152                  break;
1153               }
1154               default:
1155                  throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid escape sequence '\\{0}' in YAML string.", (char)c);
1156            }
1157            // @formatter:on
1158         } else if (c == '"') {
1159            return sb.toString();
1160         } else {
1161            sb.append((char)c);
1162         }
1163      }
1164      throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find end of double-quoted YAML string.");
1165   }
1166
1167   // ==========================================
1168   // Plain scalar (unquoted)
1169   // ==========================================
1170   @SuppressWarnings({
1171      "unused",    // indent accepted for context but not currently used in parsing logic
1172      "java:S1172", // Same as above
1173      "java:S3776"  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for plain scalar parsing
1174   })
1175   private static String parsePlainScalar(ParserReader r, int indent) throws IOException {
1176      var sb = new StringBuilder();
1177      int c;
1178      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1179         if (c == '\n' || c == '\r') {
1180            r.unread();
1181            break;
1182         }
1183         if (c == ':') {
1184            int next = r.peek();
1185            if (next == ' ' || next == '\n' || next == '\r' || next == -1) {
1186               r.unread(); // unread ':'
1187               break;
1188            }
1189            sb.append((char)c);
1190         } else if (c == ' ') {
1191            int next = r.peek();
1192            if (next == '#') {
1193               // rest of line is comment
1194               r.unread();
1195               break;
1196            }
1197            sb.append((char)c);
1198         } else if ((c == ',' || c == '}' || c == ']') || (c == '#' && sb.isEmpty())) {
1199            r.unread();
1200            break;
1201         } else {
1202            sb.append((char)c);
1203         }
1204      }
1205      String result = sb.toString();
1206      // Trim trailing whitespace
1207      int end = result.length();
1208      while (end > 0 && result.charAt(end - 1) == ' ')
1209         end--;
1210      return result.substring(0, end);
1211   }
1212
1213   // ==========================================
1214   // Block scalar: | or >
1215   // ==========================================
1216   @SuppressWarnings({
1217      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for block scalar parsing
1218      "java:S6541" // Brain method acceptable for block scalar state machine
1219   })
1220   private String parseBlockScalar(ParserReader r, char indicator) throws IOException, ParseException {
1221      r.read(); // consume '|' or '>'
1222
1223      // Parse indicator line for chomping
1224      char chomping = ' '; // default = clip
1225      int c;
1226      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1227         if (c == '-') {
1228            chomping = '-'; // strip
1229         } else if (c == '+') {
1230            chomping = '+'; // keep
1231         } else if (c == '\n' || c == '\r') {
1232            if (c == '\r') {
1233               int next = r.peek();
1234               if (next == '\n')
1235                  r.read();
1236            }
1237            break;
1238         } else if (c >= '1' && c <= '9') {
1239            // explicit indent indicator, ignore for now (auto-detect below)
1240         } else if (c == ' ' || c == '\t') {
1241            continue;
1242         } else {
1243            throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected character ''{0}'' in YAML block scalar indicator.", (char)c);
1244         }
1245      }
1246
1247      // Read the block content
1248      int blockIndent = -1;
1249      var lines = new ArrayList<String>();
1250      int trailingNewlines = 0;
1251
1252      while (true) {
1253         // Count leading spaces
1254         int spaces = 0;
1255         while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1256            if (c == ' ')
1257               spaces++;
1258            else
1259               break;
1260         }
1261
1262         if (c == -1) {
1263            break;
1264         }
1265
1266         if (c == '\n' || c == '\r') {
1267            // Empty line
1268            trailingNewlines++;
1269            lines.add("");
1270            if (c == '\r' && r.peek() == '\n')
1271               r.read();
1272            continue;
1273         }
1274
1275         if (blockIndent == -1) {
1276            blockIndent = spaces;
1277         }
1278
1279         if (spaces < blockIndent) {
1280            // End of block, push back everything
1281            r.unread(); // push back non-space char
1282            for (int i = 0; i < spaces; i++)
1283               r.unread();
1284            break;
1285         }
1286
1287         // Read rest of line
1288         var lineSb = new StringBuilder();
1289         // Include extra spaces beyond blockIndent
1290         for (int i = blockIndent; i < spaces; i++)
1291            lineSb.append(' ');
1292         lineSb.append((char)c);
1293         while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1294            if (c == '\n' || c == '\r') {
1295               if (c == '\r' && r.peek() == '\n')
1296                  r.read();
1297               break;
1298            }
1299            lineSb.append((char)c);
1300         }
1301
1302         // Account for any blank lines that preceded this content line
1303         for (int i = 0; i < trailingNewlines; i++)
1304            lines.add("");
1305         trailingNewlines = 0;
1306         lines.add(lineSb.toString());
1307
1308         if (c == -1)
1309            break;
1310      }
1311
1312      // Build the result based on indicator and chomping
1313      var sb = new StringBuilder();
1314      for (int i = 0; i < lines.size(); i++) {
1315         String line = lines.get(i);
1316         if (indicator == '|') {
1317            // Literal: preserve newlines
1318            if (i > 0)
1319               sb.append('\n');
1320            sb.append(line);
1321         } else {
1322            // Folded: single newlines -> space, multiple newlines preserved
1323            if (i > 0) {
1324               if (line.isEmpty() || lines.get(i - 1).isEmpty()) {
1325                  sb.append('\n');
1326               } else {
1327                  sb.append(' ');
1328               }
1329            }
1330            sb.append(line);
1331         }
1332      }
1333
1334      // Apply chomping
1335      if (chomping == '-') {
1336         // strip: no trailing newline
1337      } else if (chomping == '+') {
1338         // keep: preserve all trailing newlines
1339         sb.append('\n');
1340         for (int i = 0; i < trailingNewlines; i++)
1341            sb.append('\n');
1342      } else {
1343         // clip (default): single trailing newline
1344         sb.append('\n');
1345      }
1346
1347      return sb.toString();
1348   }
1349
1350   // ==========================================
1351   // Helper methods
1352   // ==========================================
1353
1354   private static void skipWhitespaceAndComments(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
1355      int c;
1356      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1357         if (c == '#') {
1358            // Skip to end of line
1359            while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1360               if (c == '\n' || c == '\r')
1361                  break;
1362            }
1363         } else if (!isWhitespace(c)) {
1364            r.unread();
1365            return;
1366         }
1367      }
1368   }
1369
1370   private static void skipDocumentMarker(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
1371      int c = r.peek();
1372      if (c == '-') {
1373         r.read();
1374         int c2 = r.peek();
1375         if (c2 == '-') {
1376            r.read();
1377            int c3 = r.peek();
1378            if (c3 == '-') {
1379               r.read();
1380               // '---' found, skip rest of line
1381               skipToEndOfLine(r);
1382               return;
1383            }
1384            r.unread(); // unread second '-'
1385         }
1386         r.unread(); // unread first '-'
1387      } else if (c == '.') {
1388         r.read();
1389         int c2 = r.peek();
1390         if (c2 == '.') {
1391            r.read();
1392            int c3 = r.peek();
1393            if (c3 == '.') {
1394               r.read();
1395               // '...' found, skip rest of line
1396               skipToEndOfLine(r);
1397               return;
1398            }
1399            r.unread();
1400         }
1401         r.unread();
1402      }
1403   }
1404
1405   private static void skipToEndOfLine(ParserReader r) throws IOException {
1406      int c;
1407      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
1408         if (c == '\n' || c == '\r')
1409            return;
1410      }
1411   }
1412
1413   private static boolean isWhitespace(int c) {
1414      return c == ' ' || c == '\t' || c == '\n' || c == '\r';
1415   }
1416
1417   @SuppressWarnings({
1418      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for scalar type resolution
1419   })
1420   private static Object resolveScalarType(String s) {
1421      if (s == null || "null".equals(s) || "~".equals(s) || s.isEmpty())
1422         return null;
1423      if ("true".equals(s) || "True".equals(s) || "TRUE".equals(s))
1424         return Boolean.TRUE;
1425      if ("false".equals(s) || "False".equals(s) || "FALSE".equals(s))
1426         return Boolean.FALSE;
1427
1428      Object num = tryParseNumber(s);
1429      if (num != null)
1430         return num;
1431      return s;
1432   }
1433
1434   private static Object tryParseNumber(String s) {
1435      if (s.isEmpty())
1436         return null;
1437      char first = s.charAt(0);
1438      if (first != '-' && first != '+' && (first < '0' || first > '9') && first != '.')
1439         return null;
1440      try {
1441         if (s.contains(".") || s.contains("e") || s.contains("E")) {
1442            Double d = Double.parseDouble(s);
1443            return (!d.isInfinite() && !d.isNaN()) ? d : null;
1444         }
1445         return tryParseIntegerOrLong(s);
1446      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
1447         return null;
1448      }
1449   }
1450
1451   private static Object tryParseIntegerOrLong(String s) {
1452      try {
1453         return Integer.valueOf(s);
1454      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
1455         try {
1456            return Long.valueOf(s);
1457         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e2) {
1458            return null;
1459         }
1460      }
1461   }
1462}
